social.headline: Every post, across every platform
social.subline: JARVIS publishes and schedules Kattan Media's content across Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok and Snapchat — one place for everything live and upcoming.

ads.headline: Every ad account, in one console
ads.subline: Meta, Google, TikTok, Snapchat and X accounts for each client — JARVIS paces, shifts budget and catches waste automatically.
ads.campaignsSub: Every live campaign across platforms, sorted by spend.
ads.note: Figures are a demo workspace illustrating how JARVIS unifies and acts on ad accounts.

team.headline: Who runs each client — and what they're on
team.subline: The team behind each client, what they're working on now, and what they shipped this week — in one view.
team.whoSub: The assigned pod and how loaded they are.
team.boardSub: What the team is working on right now, by status.
team.accSub: Recent wins delivered by the team.

client.workspaceHint: Every dashboard, decision and report is scoped to this client.
client.rollupHint: Combined view across all client workspaces.

assistant.name: Jarvis
assistant.placeholder: Ask about your operations, a department, a client, or settings…
assistant.scopeNote: I keep to business operations, your departments and clients, and portal settings.

notifications.headline: Notifications
notifications.subline: Everything that needs your attention, grouped and filterable. Mark as read once you've acted.
notifications.empty: Nothing here. You're all caught up.

login.headline: Welcome to your operations workspace
login.subline: Sign in to see what Jarvis is running across Kattan Media's departments and clients.
login.demoHelper: Demo environment · any email and password will work.
login.errorRequired: Please enter your email and password.
login.footnote: JARVIS × Kattan Media · Engineered in Saudi.

control.headline: Operations overview
control.subline: A single, calm view of every Jarvis workflow running across Kattan Media — for the selected client.
control.deptHeatSub: Status at a glance · select one to dive in.
control.executionLogSub: What Jarvis has been doing across departments.

depts.indexSubline: Six departments running on autonomous operational architecture — internal ops and client delivery in one place. Open one to see what's live.

dept.scopeEmpty: No workflows in this scope for this department.

solution.decisionsSub: Recent autonomous decisions made by this workflow.
solution.interventionsSub: Items the workflow flagged for a human review.
solution.workflowSub: Data sources, the Jarvis agent, integrations and outputs.
solution.actionApplied: Done · recorded in this demo workspace.

academy.headline: Train your team alongside the system
academy.subline: Short, practical modules that help Kattan Media's people work confidently with Jarvis.
academy.comingSoon: Module preview isn't available in this demo build. Your Jarvis engineer can enable it for you.

savings.headline: Total impact, line by line.
savings.subline: Every Saudi riyal the JARVIS operating layer has freed up across Kattan Media this year — and what it would have cost without it.
savings.comparisonSub: Operating cost baseline against the same operations running through JARVIS.
savings.deptBreakdownSub: Where the impact actually lands. Sorted by year-to-date value.
savings.categoriesSub: Six structural levers the JARVIS operating layer pulls.
savings.trendSub: Last six months of realized savings.
savings.methodologyBody: Each amount is the difference between the prior operating-cost baseline and the realized cost of the same work running through JARVIS. Demo numbers — illustrative only.

contact.headline: Request an operational review
contact.subline: Send a note to the Jarvis engineer assigned to the Kattan Media deployment.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Got it. Your Jarvis engineer will reply within one business day.
contact.demoHelper: Demo environment · this form doesn't actually send.
